/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/angry_bird_sim.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/angry_bird_sim.dir/physics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/angry_bird_sim.dir/collision.cpp.o CMakeFiles/angry_bird_sim.dir/scene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/angry_bird_sim.dir/input.cpp.o CMakeFiles/angry_bird_sim.dir/render.cpp.o -o angry_bird_sim  _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a -framework OpenGL -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation
